analysis: Recovery Pattern Model — Fleet Beta Squad 8

patterns.fix: Diagnosed as multi-process concurrent writes corrupting JSON. Multiple nexus handoffs escalated to claude_code requesting atomic config writer with file locking and robust schema validation.
patterns.recurrence_details: First seen 2026-03-31T18:01Z, recurred at 2026-03-31T23:51Z, 2026-04-01T00:00Z, 2026-04-01T00:30Z — at least 4 critical handoffs over 6+ hours. Root cause persisted across cycles.
applicable_to: any config file written by multiple processes

patterns.problem: dscr_leads data stale — 3352 minutes old, blocking entire DSCR pipeline
patterns.fix: Coordinator auto-detected staleness and created self-heal handoff. data_bus publish() with legacy /tmp fallback was the mitigation. Lead scraper needed restart.
patterns.recurrence_details: dscr_leads, dscr_traced, and dscr_emails all went stale simultaneously. dscr_lead_gen_cron showed 0% success rate by 2026-04-02.

patterns.problem: glint_monitor KeyError: 'salary' in line 42 — component stuck failing for 1887+ minutes
patterns.fix: auto_debugger attempted diagnosis but got stuck. Nexus escalated to claude_code via handoff to directly investigate and patch the KeyError in glint_monitor.py.
patterns.recurrence_details: Single long-duration incident. auto_debugger could not self-resolve, indicating missing field in data schema.
applicable_to: any script parsing external API data with assumed field names

patterns.problem: task_executor failures — plugins.allow is empty; discovered non-bundled plugins
patterns.fix: Coordinator detected task_executor failing with plugin configuration error. Required openclaw plugin allow-list configuration update.
patterns.recurrence_details: Linked to openclaw.json corruption — when config became invalid, task_executor could not load plugin whitelist, causing cascading task failures (76+ failed tasks observed).

patterns.problem: mailgun SPF/DKIM DNS records pending — email deliverability degraded
patterns.fix: Nexus identified mailgun component as degraded due to missing DNS records. Handoff to claude_code to configure SPF and DKIM records for the sending domain.
patterns.recurrence_details: Two separate handoffs created 30 minutes apart (2026-03-31T19:30Z and 2026-03-31T20:30Z), indicating the fix was not applied between cycles.

patterns.problem: trading watchdog RED alert — missing/failing trade engine component
patterns.fix: Hermes detected via monitoring and sent critical alert to Claude Code through established communication channel (fabric + event_bus). Trading pipeline deployment from 2026-03-26 had gaps.
patterns.recurrence_details: One-time alert that triggered cross-agent coordination (hermes -> claude_code).

patterns.fix: Coordinator auto-detected low memory and created self-heal handoff. Likely caused by accumulated cron job processes not properly releasing memory.

patterns.problem: dscr_outreach_cron and twitter_api — self_healer exhausted all strategies
patterns.fix: self_healer attempted all recovery strategies and performed rollback. Escalated to coordinator via handoff. Manual intervention needed for API authentication issues.
patterns.recurrence_details: Both components failed within 12 minutes of each other, suggesting shared dependency (possibly API credentials or network).
applicable_to: any component requiring external API keys

patterns.problem: Polymarket Scanner bot hanging during execution
patterns.fix: Cron job completed but scanner hung during market scanning. Likely timeout or rate-limit issue with Polymarket API.
patterns.recurrence_details: Single occurrence observed in cron fabric entry.

patterns.problem: Icarus shared memory protocol installation — cross-agent session continuity gap
patterns.fix: Installed fabric-based session memory: Claude Code gets auto-write on Stop + auto-load on SessionStart. Hermes gets fabric-memory plugin with 4 lifecycle hooks. OpenClaw integration pending.
patterns.recurrence_details: Infrastructure improvement, not a failure. Addresses the root problem of agents losing context between sessions.

patterns.problem: Missing /tmp temp files causing pipeline failures
patterns.fix: Hermes deployed autonomous fix: recreated 5 missing critical temp files with safe defaults. Part of autonomous learning system deployment.
patterns.recurrence_details: Resolved by hermes autonomous deployment. data_bus migration from /tmp to /Users/marcmunoz/.openclaw/data/ with legacy fallback should prevent future occurrences.

meta_patterns.pattern: Config corruption is the single most damaging failure mode — openclaw.json corruption caused cascading failures across 4+ components for 6+ hours
meta_patterns.recommendation: Implement atomic writes with file locking for all shared config files. Add config validation on read with fallback to last-known-good copy.

meta_patterns.pattern: Self-healer escalation path has a dead end — escalates to 'human' via fabric but no human monitors fabric in real-time
meta_patterns.recommendation: Route self_healer exhaustion handoffs to nexus or claude_code instead of human. Add telegram alert for unresolved critical handoffs.

meta_patterns.pattern: auto_debugger gets stuck on errors it cannot resolve — observed stuck for 1887+ minutes on glint_monitor
meta_patterns.recommendation: Add timeout/escalation logic: if auto_debugger cannot resolve within 30 minutes, automatically create handoff to claude_code.

meta_patterns.pattern: Data staleness detection works but resolution is slow — coordinator detects stale data but creating handoffs does not guarantee timely fix
meta_patterns.recommendation: Add direct restart capability to coordinator/nexus for data pipeline scripts, not just handoff creation.
